resources.string: Bench Press – 4 sets of 8-10 reps\n Incline Dumbbell Press – 3 sets of 10-12 reps\n Tricep Dips – 3 sets of 12 reps
Pull-Ups (Assisted if needed) – 4 sets to failure\n Bent Over Rows – 4 sets of 10-12 reps\n Barbell Curls – 3 sets of 12 reps
Squats – 4 sets of 10-12 reps\n Leg Press – 3 sets of 12 reps\n Calf Raises – 4 sets of 15-20 reps
Overhead Shoulder Press – 4 sets of 10 reps\n Lateral Raises – 3 sets of 15 reps\n Plank – 3 sets of 1 minute
Deadlift – 4 sets of 8-10 reps\n Push-Ups – 3 sets to failure\n Burpees – 3 sets of 15 reps

Scrambled Eggs (3 eggs) with Spinach and Cherry Tomatoes
 Whole Grain Toast (1 slice)
 Green Tea or Black Coffee
Grilled Chicken Salad (mixed greens, cucumber, bell peppers, olive oil dressing)\n Quinoa (1 cup)\n
Baked Salmon with Lemon and Dill\n Steamed Broccoli\n Sweet Potato (medium-sized, roasted)
